identity.name: TeacherHubPro
identity.core_philosophy: Digital efficiency with the soul of a paper planner.

headings.usage: Page titles, Hero sections, 'Welcome Back' messages. NEVER for small UI labels.

body.usage: All UI text, paragraphs, form labels, buttons.

background.name: Warm Paper
background.usage: Global app background. MUST have noise texture overlay.

primary.name: Academic Navy
primary.usage: Primary text, Active states, Sidebar active items.

accent.name: Growth Green
accent.usage: Primary Buttons, Success states, 'New' badges. (Refined from harsh lime).

texture.name: Paper Noise
texture.rule: Apply to the <body> or main app container. Do not apply to Cards.

rules: Quick Actions: col-span-4 (Sidebar style or Card)
Hero: Left align text, Right align image (or vice versa).
Pricing: 4-column grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 4 col desktop).

bilingual_support.rule: All buttons and containers must accommodate 30% more text length for Spanish translations. Avoid fixed widths on text containers.

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-white hover:bg-accent/90 shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent/10 text-primary shadow-sm

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-card hover:shadow-float transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/20 focus:border-accent rounded-lg

sidebar.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-border h-screen sticky top-0
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary hover:bg-accent/10 transition-colors

features.usage: Feature section background or side image

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. APPLY THE PAPER TEXTURE: Ensure the 'paper-bg' class is applied to the main layout wrapper.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Use 'Playfair Display' ONLY for main page headings. Use 'Manrope' for everything else.
3. SPACING: Increase padding inside cards. Use 'p-6' or 'p-8' instead of 'p-4'.
4. BILINGUAL: Ensure UI elements don't break with longer Spanish text.
5. SHADOWS: Use soft, diffuse shadows. Avoid harsh black shadows.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
